title: BetterTogether
description: A performance optimized Minecraft experience built for friends that combines smooth visuals, realistic shaders, voice chat, and helpful utilities while keeping gameplay close to vanilla.
body:
BetterTogether is a modern Minecraft modpack designed to make multiplayer feel smooth, immersive, and connected. 
It enhances the vanilla experience with realistic shaders, improved performance, and social features like built-in voice chat. Every mod has been carefully selected to keep gameplay familiar while adding subtle improvements that make the world feel alive.

This pack includes tools for better visuals and atmosphere, such as improved lighting, realistic skies, and fine-tuned sound effects. 

Performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and ImmediatelyFast keep the game running smoothly even on larger servers. 

Players can stay oriented with Xaero’s Minimap and World Map, enjoy higher render distances with Distant Horizons, and communicate naturally through Simple Voice Chat.

BetterTogether is perfect for small communities or friends who want to explore, build, and talk together in a world that feels both beautiful and efficient. It keeps Minecraft close to its roots while making everything look and run better than ever.
